expectations.text: Response covers both Next.js server actions AND Drizzle ORM transactions

notes: Comprehensive response from training knowledge. Covers more scenarios (nested transactions, manual rollback, client component usage) than the with-skill version. However, accuracy of API details depends on training data freshness.
